name: Pork Tenderloin Diane
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Pork tenderloin, cut crosswise into 8 pieces
1 tbsp Finely chopped chives or parsley
recipeInstructions:
1. Press each tenderloin piece into a 1-inch thick medallion; sprinkle surfaces with lemon pepper.
2. Melt butter in a large heavy skillet over medium heat.
3. Add medallions; cook for 3 to 4 minutes on each side. Remove pork to serving platter and keep warm.
4. Stir lemon juice, Worcestershire sauce, and mustard into pan juices in the skillet. Cook, stirring, until heated through.
5. Pour sauce over medallions; sprinkle with chopped chives.
6. Garnish with whole chives.
7. Serve with vegetables.
Makes 5 servings.
